title: Changes to voluntary National Insurance contributions for periods spent abroad
body: "At Autumn Budget 2025, the government announced changes to voluntary National Insurance contributions for those living or working abroad.  From 6 April 2026, individuals will no longer be able to pay voluntary Class 2 National Insurance contributions for periods abroad. Only voluntary Class 3 contributions will be available for tax years 2026 to 2027 onwards.  This change does not affect any voluntary contributions that can be paid for periods abroad before 6 April 2026.  Further details and guidance will be published at a later date. "
